creator: rasmus@abiosis.dk
text:
FreeBSD 8.2 is missing in the /usr/share/misc/bsd-family-tree

Fix: add FreeBSD 8.2 to the tree line, according to release information[1] it was released on the 24 of January 2011.

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/releases/8.2R/schedule.html

---[ patch ]---
243a244,245
>  |  FreeBSD           |      |                 |                       |
>  |    8.2             |      |                 |                       |
525a528
> FreeBSD 8.2		2011-01-24 [FBD]
---[ eof ]---

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Look for FreeBSD 8.2 in /usr/share/misc/bsd-family-tree
